title: facility — PHP attribute contracts
description: Three class-level attributes for listener discovery. No property-level attributes: the four owned rows (Facility, ResourceBooking, DayPass, Pass) use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation. `#[AsFacilityListener]` subscribes to facility-catalogue events (create / retire / blackout / pricing / availability). `#[AsBookingListener]` subscribes to booking-lifecycle events (create / cancel / no-show / complete / overlap-detected). `#[AsPassListener]` subscribes to both DayPass AND Pass events. Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events.

attributes.name: AsFacilityListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to facility-catalogue lifecycle events (FacilityCreated / FacilityUpdated / FacilityStatusChanged / FacilityPricingUpdated / FacilityBlackoutAdded / FacilityBlackoutRemoved / FacilityAvailabilityChanged / FacilityRetired).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`FacilityCreated`, `FacilityRetired`, `FacilityBlackoutAdded`, …). Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Facility\Events\Facility*` event. Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (see events.json). Use to route cache-warmers / notification fan-out onto a dedicated queue.

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. Cascade listeners (CancelFutureBookingsOnFacilityRetired) declare priority 50 so they run before notification listeners.

attributes.name: AsBookingListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to booking-lifecycle events (BookingCreated / BookingConfirmed / BookingCancelled / BookingCompleted / BookingMarkedNoShow / BookingRescheduled / BookingOverlapDetected / BookingCheckedIn). BookingOverlapDetected is CRITICAL — it means overlap-detection failed and a double-booking exists; consumers of that event MUST alert ops immediately.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. BookingOverlapDetected consumers should override to `notifications-critical`.

attributes.name: AsPassListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to Pass + DayPass lifecycle events (PassIssued / PassCreditConsumed / PassExhausted / PassExpired / PassTransferred / PassRevoked / DayPassIssued / DayPassConsumed / DayPassExpired / DayPassRefunded). The two entity types share this attribute because most bridging consumers care about the union (Finance module attributes revenue for both alike, Notifications module renders both alike).

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Facility\Events\Pass*` AND `Stackra\Facility\Events\DayPass*` event.
